title: Srimathi Annapurna Catering
desc: Camaraderie sours as Lalitha and Annapurna vie for Shivaramaraju's affection, both marrying him. Subsequently, a birthing mishap compels him to clandestinely part Annapurna's twins.

title: Srihari Kalyanam
desc: Lakshmi, devoted to her family, weds Srihari, vowing to keep supporting her loved ones. Their marriage soon faces unexpected trials, testing their bond and joy.
